_comment: Pinned Obsidian community plugins the authoring vault vendors. scripts/build-vault.mjs writes each plugin's manifest.json (committed, tiny) from the embedded `manifest` here, and --fetch-plugins downloads `assets` from <repo>/releases/download/<version>/<file>, verifies each sha256, and lays main.js/styles.css into the built vault (those binaries are gitignored, not committed — see .gitignore). Bumping a version means updating `version`, the embedded `manifest`, and the asset sha256 sums, then `aubr build:vault` + commit.

manifest.name: Metadata Menu
manifest.description: For data quality enthusiasts (and dataview users): manage the metadata of your notes.
manifest.author: mdelobelle

manifest.name: Templater
manifest.description: Advanced templating and automation using handlebars-like syntax.
manifest.author: SilentVoid

manifest.name: Remotely Save
manifest.description: Yet another unofficial plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service.
manifest.author: fyears
